description.es: Turn unstructured notes, transcripts, or articles into structured primitives such as action items, reminders, CRM contacts, memories, and goals.
description.fr: Turn unstructured notes, transcripts, or articles into structured primitives such as action items, reminders, CRM contacts, memories, and goals.
description.ro: Turn unstructured notes, transcripts, or articles into structured primitives such as action items, reminders, CRM contacts, memories, and goals.
description.it: Turn unstructured notes, transcripts, or articles into structured primitives such as action items, reminders, CRM contacts, memories, and goals.

description.en: JoAi is a platform for creating and managing your own AI agents.
description.de: JoAi ist eine Plattform für das Erstellen und Verwalten eigener AI-Agenten.
description.fr: JoAi est une plateforme qui permet de créer et de gérer vos propres agents IA.
description.es: JoAi es una plataforma para crear y gestionar tus propios agentes de IA.
description.ro: JoAi este o platforma pentru crearea si gestionarea propriilor tai agenti AI.

warp.name: JoAi: Ingest Knowledge

description.en: Turn unstructured notes, transcripts, or articles into structured primitives such as action items, reminders, CRM contacts, memories, and goals.
description.de: Verwandle unstrukturierte Notizen, Transkripte oder Artikel in strukturierte Primitive wie Action Items, Erinnerungen, CRM-Kontakte, Erinnerungen und Ziele.
description.es: Turn unstructured notes, transcripts, or articles into structured primitives such as action items, reminders, CRM contacts, memories, and goals.
description.fr: Turn unstructured notes, transcripts, or articles into structured primitives such as action items, reminders, CRM contacts, memories, and goals.
description.ro: Turn unstructured notes, transcripts, or articles into structured primitives such as action items, reminders, CRM contacts, memories, and goals.
description.it: Turn unstructured notes, transcripts, or articles into structured primitives such as action items, reminders, CRM contacts, memories, and goals.

warp.bot: Use this when the user shares raw notes, meeting transcripts, or long-form text and wants it automatically structured into useful primitives. Prefer this warp over manually creating many separate objects.

inputs.name: Content
inputs.bot: The full raw content to ingest. Keep original details because extraction quality depends on this.

inputs.name: Source Type
inputs.bot: Where the content comes from. Use meeting, note, context, article, email, chat, or webhook.

inputs.name: Source Provider
inputs.bot: Optional provider/origin such as zoom, google-meet, slack, or manual.

inputs.name: Source External ID
inputs.bot: Optional external reference ID used for deduplication.

inputs.name: Title
inputs.bot: Optional title for this ingestion payload.

inputs.name: Primitives
inputs.bot: Optional comma-separated subset: memory, context, action_item, crm_contact, reminder, article, goal.

success.en: Ingestion queued. I am extracting structured primitives now.
success.de: Erfassung gestartet. Ich extrahiere jetzt strukturierte Primitive.
success.es: Ingestion queued. I am extracting structured primitives now.
success.fr: Ingestion queued. I am extracting structured primitives now.
success.ro: Ingestion queued. I am extracting structured primitives now.
success.it: Ingestion queued. I am extracting structured primitives now.

description.en: View the current vote counts for each option.

description.fr: Consultez le nombre actuel de voix pour chaque option.
description.es: Consulta el numero actual de votos de cada opcion.
description.ro: Vezi numarul curent de voturi pentru fiecare optiune.
description.it: View the current vote counts for each option.

description.ro: Sondaje on-chain si grupuri de vot pentru orice comunitate: proprietari, DAO-uri, echipe si multe altele.
